markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.102 — Self-insurance

A motor carrier may comply with Section 643.101 (Amount Required) through self-insurance if the carrier demonstrates to the department that it can satisfy its obligations for liability for bodily injury or property damage. In the interest of public safety, the department by rule shall provide for a responsible system of self-insurance for a motor carrier.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.150(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*
